phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Gallerie dell'Accademia is
phrases.cultural_note: The Gallerie dell'Accademia holds Venice's greatest collection of Venetian painting, from Bellini to Titian and Tintoretto.

responses.english: On the Grand Canal, Dorsoduro side, near the bridge.
responses.phonetic: sool kah-NAH-leh GRAN-deh, LAH-toh dor-soh-DOO-roh, vee-CHEE-noh al PON-teh.
responses.local: Sul Canale Grande, lato Dorsoduro, vicino al ponte.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Peggy Guggenheim Collection is
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è la Collezione Peggy Guggenheim?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH lah kol-leh-TSYOH-neh PEG-ghee GOO-ghen-hime?

responses.english: On the Grand Canal, five minutes from the Accademia.
responses.phonetic: sool kah-NAH-leh GRAN-deh, ah CHEEN-kweh mee-NOO-tee dal-lat-chah-DEH-myah.
responses.local: Sul Canal Grande, a cinque minuti dall'Accademia.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Campo Santa Margherita is
phrases.cultural_note: Campo Santa Margherita is Dorsoduro's main square and the social hub of Venice's student population.

responses.english: Straight on from the Accademia, five minutes.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to have cicchetti and wine
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si fa l'ombra e i cicchetti a Dorsoduro?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see fah LOM-brah eh ee CHEE-ket-tee ah dor-soh-DOO-roh?

responses.english: At Campo Santa Margherita, several excellent bacari.
responses.phonetic: een KAM-poh SAN-tah mar-gheh-REE-tah, dee-VER-see bah-KAH-ree ot-TEE-mee.
responses.local: In Campo Santa Margherita, diversi bacari ottimi.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which vaporetto stop is closest to Dorsoduro
phrases.text_local: Scusi, quale fermata del vaporetto è più vicina a Dorsoduro?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAH-leh fer-MAH-tah del vah-poh-RET-toh eh PYOO vee-CHEE-nah ah dor-soh-DOO-roh?

responses.english: Ca' Rezzonico, line one, is the most central.
responses.phonetic: kah ret-tsoh-NEE-koh, LEE-neh-ah OO-noh, eh lah PYOO chen-TRAH-leh.
responses.local: Ca' Rezzonico, linea uno, è la più centrale.
